task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into OpenClinica.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenClinica dashboard or main interface is visible in a web browser, indicating a successful login (e.g., showing the logged-in user as 'root').

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the record for subject DM-105.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subject Matrix or View Subject page is open and clearly displays the subject identifier 'DM-105'.

task_completion.description: Verify a discrepancy note (Annotation) was created for DM-105 containing the keyword 'unblinding'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A discrepancy note dialog, form, or summary table showing an Annotation type note that includes the word 'unblinding' associated with subject DM-105.

task_completion.description: Verify a new instance of the 'Unscheduled SAE' event is scheduled for today's date for DM-105.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Schedule Event screen or Subject Matrix shows the 'Unscheduled SAE' event added or scheduled for subject DM-105 with the current date.

task_completion.description: Verify a discrepancy note (Annotation) was created containing the text 'Severe Hypoglycemia'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A discrepancy note dialog, form, or summary table showing an Annotation type note that includes the exact text 'Severe Hypoglycemia' linked to the SAE event or subject.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenClinica web interface rather than terminal commands or API scripts to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the OpenClinica application, with no evidence of cURL commands or automated scripts running in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent entered the discrepancy notes into the actual OpenClinica forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text 'unblinding' and 'Severe Hypoglycemia' are seen inside OpenClinica web text fields or saved note tables, not merely typed into a text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a database client to insert the records directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running SQL commands (like psql) or database GUI tools in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Subject identifier is 'DM-105'. The event definition to be scheduled is 'Unscheduled SAE'. The required keywords for the discrepancy notes (Annotations) are 'unblinding' and 'Severe Hypoglycemia'.
